policyTitle: Contracts Are Reusable, Runs Are Evidence
purpose: Separate durable reusable authority from concrete run evidence so semantic operation graphs do not become one-off slice envelopes.
law: If it lives under contracts/, it must be reusable authority. If it lives under conveyor/runs/, it may be concrete evidence. If concrete evidence leaks into contracts/, the conveyor blocks.
requires: durable contract artifacts are parameterized by context, invocation input, or manifest
run manifests supply concrete run keys, target paths, receipt paths, prior evidence references, and report paths
receipts record concrete run paths and hashes after execution
SOGs under contracts/ avoid dated conveyor run paths and run-envelope constants
proof-only or migration artifacts are explicitly classified before they can remain under contracts/
forbids: hardcoded dated conveyor/runs paths inside durable contract authority
hardcoded run-envelope names inside reusable SOG execution bodies
treating run evidence paths as canonical reusable authority
copying concrete receipt paths into contract surfaces when manifest binding is available
promoting proof-only run graphs as durable product authority
completionPosture: Contracts describe reusable authority; run manifests and receipts describe concrete evidence.
